name: Barbecued Pork Steaks 2
recipeIngredient: 4 pork blade steaks, cut 1 to 1 1/4 inches thick
recipeInstructions:
1. Pound the steaks with a meat mallet.
2. In a small bowl, combine the remaining ingredients for the sauce; mix well.
3. Place the steaks on the grill about 4 inches above medium-slow coals.
4. Cook each side of the steaks for about 8 minutes.
5. Brush the steaks with sauce and continue cooking for an additional 5 minutes, turning and brushing with sauce.
Source:
"National Pork Producers Council"
http://www.nppc.org
S (Cooking Time): 0:15
